name: Pressure Cooking Chart for Dry Beans 2
recipeIngredient: Do not fill cooker over 1/2 full
Use 1 tbsp oil per cup of beans
Amount of liquid needed for 1 cup of beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Bean item will be followed by the amount of liquid needed and then minutes to cook at high pressure.
2. All take 2 1/2 cups liquid except blackeyed peas.
3. Black-eyed peas: 2 cups liquid, 10 minutes
4. Great Northern beans: 20 minutes
5. Kidney beans: 30 minutes
6. Lentils: 20 minutes
7. Lima Beans (large): 30 minutes
8. Lima beans (small): 25 minutes
9. Navy beans: 30 minutes
10. Pea beans: 20 minutes
11. Pinto beans: 10 minutes
12. Soybeans: 35 minutes
